tree_free_500_ceiling_at_splitk_wall.definition: central tree-free official TPS at the denken #117 SplitK wall (net 1.56%)

gate.tree_required_et_note: tree-free MISSES 500 -> bare tree must hit this E[T] to clear 500

splitk_needed_for_treefree_500.note: tree-free needs SplitK >= central-levers 4.84% / corner 5.84%; #117 delivers net 1.56% central (MISS), 7.81% optimistic band-high (clears) -> straddle, central wall misses

reprice_106_crossover.interpretation: fern #106's recovery gate to OVERTAKE tree-free DROPS from 4.791 (vs 518.1) to 4.548 (vs the lower 491.8) -- but that is no longer the binding gate: since tree-free MISSES 500, the tree must clear the ABSOLUTE 500 (E[T] >= 4.624), which is higher than the overtake-floor crossover. The tree's status flips from bounded-UPSIDE (#106 AMBER, optional) to REQUIRED-for-500.

gate.verdict_label: tree-free CAPS BELOW 500 at the central #117 wall (491.8 < 500, gap 8.2); it clears 500 ONLY at the optimistic 7.81% band-high (527.3, the 88%-GDDR6 corner #117 prices as optimistic-not-expected) -> the tree (land #71) is now REQUIRED for 500, not insurance. It must recover realized E[T] >= 4.624 (bare) / 4.555 (with the surviving cheap levers), ~57% up #101's recoverable band -- and it is build-blocked at E[T]=2.10 (#101 fixable defect) -> that build is now the critical path.
gate.validity_caveat: SEPARATE GATE: even a tree-free OR tree 500 needs the greedy-identity VALIDITY ruling (kanna #114 + the human contract) which sits on top of ALL TPS math here. This re-price is a TPS-ceiling result only.
gate.rule: GREEN=tree-free clears 500 at the central #117 wall / AMBER=clears only at the optimistic 7.81% band-high or tau=1 corner / RED=caps below 500 at the central wall -> tree required for 500

model_self_check_vs_117.definition: s=3.20% gross, corner-conservative levers, tau in {0.96,0.99,1.00}

step2_lever_table.note: bandwidth-util lever vg/(1+s); #117 PHYSICAL ceiling (was assumed 8.5%)
E[T] numerator (+1.0% central, linear in TPS); prediction-only

reprice_106_crossover.interpretation: fern #106's recovery gate to OVERTAKE tree-free DROPS from 4.791 (vs 518.1) to 4.548 (vs the lower 491.8) -- but that is no longer the binding gate: since tree-free MISSES 500, the tree must clear the ABSOLUTE 500 (E[T] >= 4.624), which is higher than the overtake-floor crossover. The tree's status flips from bounded-UPSIDE (#106 AMBER, optional) to REQUIRED-for-500.

public_evidence.leaderboard_note: public #1 frantic-penguin skv64 489.63 (valid); the SplitK/argmax-block class (byteshark 484.62, need-for-speed 488.07) realizes only +0.6-1.7% over 481.53 and NONE clears 500 -> field-side corroboration that SplitK alone is at its physical wall, consistent with #117's 3.20% ceiling.

method: CPU-only analytic. REUSES denken #105 compose + lawine #99 multiplier CI + fern #102 break-even (over fern #100), swapping exactly two inputs: SplitK -> denken #117 physical ceiling (net 1.56% / band-high 7.81%), tau -> lawine #116 derived [0.9983,1.00]. No GPU, no served change, greedy identity untouched (TPS-ceiling only; validity is a separate gate).
